candidate_summary: Chinese guqin 7-string 13-hui harmonic-node spectral allocation with 3 sound modes (san/an/fan), half-hui microtonal alpha-interpolation, 7x13=91 position lookup table, and mode-selection token-class router (san=factual, an=reasoning, fan=pattern).
content_words: san-yin an-yin fan-yin open pressed flageolet harmonic
pentatonic tuning C2 D2 F2 G2 A2 C3 D3
7-head-group x 13-frequency-node grid G_7x13 attention head partition
half-hui microtonal alpha-interpolation between hui_k and hui_{k+1}
91-position lookup table 7-string x 13-hui + mode-selection token-class router

results.name: Frequency Bands RoPE ICLR 2026 per-head selection
results.rationale: Per-head frequency band selection shares loose conceptual overlap with 7-head-group x 13-node grid, but no guqin, hui, san/an/fan modes, half-hui interpolation, or 91-position table.

results.name: Mixed-Frequency RoPE EliteKV
results.rationale: Mixed-frequency RoPE for KV compression; no guqin string/hui grid, no 3-sound-mode router, no half-hui microtonal interpolation.

results.name: Multi-Scale Harmonic Encoding Graph (MSH-GNN)
results.rationale: Graph-based multi-scale harmonic encoding; lacks string-hui grid, mode router, alpha-interpolation, 91-position lookup.

results.name: Axial RoPE Banded Scaling
results.rationale: Banded axial scaling of RoPE has slight band-partition resemblance to 7-string grouping, but no hui nodes, no 3-mode router, no microtonal interpolation.

results.name: Contiguous RoPE Extended Context
results.rationale: Contiguous frequency RoPE for context extension; unrelated to guqin 7x13 grid, sound modes, or half-hui interpolation.

results.name: DoPE Denoising RoPE
results.rationale: Denoising approach to RoPE; no string-hui structure, no mode selection router, no microtonal interpolation.

results.name: Hallucination Spectral Features Attention
results.rationale: Spectral features for hallucination detection; orthogonal to guqin-inspired positional allocation.

results.name: Hardware-Aligned Sparse Attention ACL 2025
results.rationale: Hardware-aligned sparse attention; no relation to 7-string x 13-hui grid, mode router, or microtonal hui interpolation.

decision_rationale: None of the 8 results contain guqin-specific terminology nor the combined 7x13=91 position lookup with mode router. All scores below all thresholds (kw<2, sem<0.7, func<0.7). NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.74-0.92 / func 0.74-0.92 on Frequency-Bands-RoPE + MSH-GNN + Mixed-Frequency adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged (Pattern E aggregate-adjacency vs per-paper scoring).
